daysPeriod.title: Relative – Days Before Today
daysPeriod.description: Sets the range period as number of days from now. When set to 0, all data is fetched. Mailkit API limitation: CAMPAIGNS, ENGAGEMENT and RAW_* datasets do not support date filtering and will always return all available data. MLIST_UNSUBSCRIBED only supports a start date (end date is always today).

dateFrom.title: Absolute – Date From
dateFrom.description: Sets range period start date in format YYYY-MM-DD. Mailkit API limitation: CAMPAIGNS, ENGAGEMENT and RAW_* datasets do not support date filtering and will always return all available data. MLIST_UNSUBSCRIBED uses this as the start date only (end date is always today).

dateTo.title: Absolute – Date To
dateTo.description: Sets range period end date in format YYYY-MM-DD. Mailkit API limitation: CAMPAIGNS, ENGAGEMENT and RAW_* datasets do not support date filtering and will always return all available data. MLIST_UNSUBSCRIBED ignores this field — its end date is always the time of extraction.

options.tooltip: If specified, only these campaigns will be downloaded
Optional for the ENGAGEMENT dataset. If left empty, all enabled mailing lists are fetched automatically.

minPageSize.title: Minimum Page Size
minPageSize.description: Stops paginating RAW_* datasets when a page returns fewer items than this threshold. This prevents the job from running indefinitely when new data is continuously added on the API side. Set to 0 to always paginate until the end.
